title: 54th Ciutadella Summer Music Festival
location: Claustre del Seminari y Teatre des Born, Ciutadella
description: A classical and chamber music festival organised by Joventuts Musicals de Ciutadella, in its 54th edition under the motto 'Música per avançar'. It offers eight concerts between 10 July and 24 August 2026, with the Seminary Cloister as the main stage and the opening at Teatre des Born performed by the Orquestra de Cambra Illa de Menorca (OCIM).
